# Vendored editor assets

These files are bundled so the KixDNS editor does not execute third-party CDN code at runtime.

| File | Upstream | SHA-256 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `bootstrap-5.3.0.min.css` | `bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css` | `7f1d37f0d90b6385354c2ac10e2bb91563c46bd7a266ed351222ebcac8496c2a` |
| `vue-3.5.40.global.prod.js` | `vue@3.5.40/dist/vue.global.prod.js` | `9e0039a3f6ed0e85308e24d737447f1af6af83d229d69e1267a32b29bc2a1337` |
| `mermaid-11.16.0.min.js` | `mermaid@11.16.0/dist/mermaid.min.js` | `74d7c46dabca328c2294733910a8aa1ed0c37451776e8d5295da38a2b758fb9b` |

The corresponding MIT license texts are stored beside the assets.
